introSection: Zyklon Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster owned by Butch Van Hull. From 2012 to 2016, it was located at O.D. Pavilion and Amusement Park in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Red track with silver supports. Zyklon / Galaxi track layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: This has the older-style Pinfari cars with the flat front which suggest that this roller coaster dates back to the 1970s or 80s.

fullText:
Zyklon Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster owned by Butch Van Hull. From 2012 to 2016, it was located at O.D. Pavilion and Amusement Park in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

Red track with silver supports. Zyklon / Galaxi track layout.

This has the older-style Pinfari cars with the flat front which suggest that this roller coaster dates back to the 1970s or 80s.


 * Video of the coaster in 1991
